item.description:
Release v4.5.1

Changes since v4.5.0

  • feat(chat): hide tool execution messages in brief verbosity mode
  • feat(conversation-list): show provider and model info in conversation list
  • feat(i18n): update conversation list plugin localization strings
  • feat(model-selector): restore context window size badge display
  • feat(model): restore model capabilities declaration and badge display
  • feat(providers): add contextWindowSizes for all LLM provider models
  • feat(rag): add rebuild index button to status bar popover
  • feat(status-message): replace loading spinner with breathing avatar animation
  • feat(ui): unify pulse ripple animation across status messages and conversation list
  • fix(appstore): hide cover art sidebar when list is empty
  • fix(i18n): Fix missing localization issues
  • fix(providers): correct context window sizes per official docs
  • fix(status): remove checkmark emoji from tool completed status message
  • fix(zhipu): inherit AnthropicCompatibleLumiProvider for TPS display
  • refactor(rag): add background index maintenance via rootOverlay
  • refactor(rag): bundle vec0.dylib inside AgentRAGPlugin package
  • refactor(rag): replace system SQLite with CSQLite target for vec0 support
  • refactor(ui): unify app picker toolbar style with project picker and add loading overlay
  • refactor(ui): unify project popover style with app picker, add search and move add button to header
  • refactor(ui): unify pulse ripple to shared LumiUI component across conversation title, list, and status messages
